nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Amitabha. Benefactor, you have come to the Valley of Ten Tribulations - surely in pursuit of the Way.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: This humble monk has cultivated here for many years and played against many masters. You carry the aura of Go - surely no ordinary hand.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Years ago, I had a game most profound - a life-and-death match against Duan Yanqing. That game taught me much. Benefactor, if you wish to hear this tale, I can recount it.

options.text: Master, I'd like to play against you

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Ah, it was many years ago. Duan Yanqing, chief of the 'Four Great Villains,' was an evil demon. Yet his skill at Go... this humble monk could only bow in respect.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: In that game, Duan Yanqing held black and moved first. I held white. Both of us understood - the loser would pay with their life for this game of Go.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Mid-game came the crisis. His black stones cut like blades, while my white stones advanced with caution. At the turning point, I made a bold decision...

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: In the upper left corner, I deliberately severed my own stones in succession. This move seemed foolish - yet it was the art of 'Sacrifice for the First Move': surrender local advantage to seize global initiative.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: When the game ended, both sides had suffered losses. Yet through the brilliant 'Sacrifice for the First Move,' this humble monk gained the first move, and we... reached a draw. Duan Yanqing was angered, but even he had to acknowledge the subtlety of this technique.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: From that day, this humble monk understood - sometimes surrendering immediate benefit leads to greater victory. This is the true essence of 'Sacrifice for the First Move.'

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Having heard this tale of my match with Duan Yanqing, benefactor, I shall now pass on to you the secret technique of 'Sacrifice for the First Move.'

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: The key to 'Sacrifice for the First Move' is: before the game begins, by expending stamina and inner energy, you allow your opponent to play first. Though this seems disadvantageous, it is a profound tactic of foresight.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Contemplate this art well. Like life itself, sometimes one step back allows many steps forward.

options.text: I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Amitabha. Since you wish to play against this humble monk, let me see your true Go skill.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Go is like cultivation - playing Go is cultivating the mind. Please!

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: No matter, the time is not yet right. When you're ready, benefactor, this humble monk will be here.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: The Way of Go is infinite. Though this humble monk has grasped 'Sacrifice for the First Move,' still must I cultivate further.

nodes.speaker: Monk Huangmei
nodes.text: Amitabha. May benefactor persevere on the path of Go and ultimately succeed.
